Class Response<T extends AbstractModelMessage>

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.agi.provider.Response<T>
Type Parameters:
T - The specific type of AbstractModelMessage this response contains.
Direct Known Subclasses:
AnthropicResponse, GeminiResponse, OpenAiCompatibleResponse, OpenAiResponse
public abstract class Response<T extends AbstractModelMessage> extends Object
A standardized, model-agnostic response received from an AI model provider. This abstract class defines the contract for a response, allowing for provider-specific implementations while maintaining a consistent API.
Author:
anahata

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    abstract List<T>
    getCandidates()
    Gets the list of candidate messages generated by the model.
    abstract Optional<String>
    getPromptFeedback()
    Gets the prompt feedback message, which explains why the prompt was blocked, if applicable.
    abstract String
    getRawHistoryJson()
    Gets the raw JSON representation of the conversation history sent in the request.
    abstract String
    getRawJson()
    Gets the raw JSON representation of the entire response object.
    abstract String
    getRawRequestConfigJson()
    Gets the raw JSON representation of the request configuration used for this response.
    abstract int
    getTotalTokenCount()
    Gets the total number of tokens for the entire interaction (prompt + all candidates).
    abstract ResponseUsageMetadata
    getUsageMetadata()
    Gets the usage metadata for the response.

    • Response

      public Response()

  • Method Details

    • getCandidates

      public abstract List<T> getCandidates()
      Gets the list of candidate messages generated by the model.
      Returns:
      A non-null, unmodifiable list of candidate messages of the specific type T.

    • getUsageMetadata

      public abstract ResponseUsageMetadata getUsageMetadata()
      Gets the usage metadata for the response.
      Returns:
      The usage metadata.

    • getPromptFeedback

      public abstract Optional<String> getPromptFeedback()
      Gets the prompt feedback message, which explains why the prompt was blocked, if applicable.
      Returns:
      An Optional containing the block reason message, or empty if not blocked.

    • getTotalTokenCount

      public abstract int getTotalTokenCount()
      Gets the total number of tokens for the entire interaction (prompt + all candidates).
      Returns:
      The total token count.

    • getRawJson

      public abstract String getRawJson()
      Gets the raw JSON representation of the entire response object.
      Returns:
      The raw JSON string.

    • getRawRequestConfigJson

      public abstract String getRawRequestConfigJson()
      Gets the raw JSON representation of the request configuration used for this response.
      Returns:
      The raw JSON string.

    • getRawHistoryJson

      public abstract String getRawHistoryJson()
      Gets the raw JSON representation of the conversation history sent in the request.
      Returns:
      The raw JSON string.
